reviews_data.owner_answer:

reviews_data.review_text: We are visiting the area and stumbled upon this coffee gem! I got the lemon bar latte two days in a row and it’s absolutely delicious - not too sweet and you can taste the espresso. I had a few sips of a caramel latte and it tasted like browned butter in the best way like they make the caramel themselves! So good - can’t wait to come back!

reviews_data.review_text: Coffee from Perti C has quickly become my favorite part of my morning routine! You will not be disappointed!

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hey there, thank you for taking the time to share this feedback. We’re really sorry for the experience you had during your visit. That day was significantly busier than expected due to our anniversary event, but we understand that doesn’t change the frustration of waiting and then not being able to get a simple drip coffee. That should not have happened.
We appreciate you giving us a try and hope you’ll give us another chance to serve you better next time!
reviews_data.review_text: I was really looking forward to trying ! After waiting in like for 20 minutes I was told the drip coffee was sold out and they would have to make another. The pot wasn’t made and I ended up having to find another coffee shop. I appreciate the kind service but I was very disappointed they were too busy to make a fresh pot of drip coffee. I’ve very disappointed bc I waited 20 mins just to be turned around bc they were too busy to make a pot.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for this awesome review Savannah. It means so much to us! :)

I look forward to returning and possibly exploring the fitness offerings as well.
